name: Moots
long_description: Moots is the Guest Intelligence platform. We engineer the room so every guest walks away with the conversation they came for, and with a relationship that lasts beyond it. Built for the events where the room matters: brand activations, advisory retreats, investor gatherings, members clubs, donor cultivation, political fundraisers, and recurring tech communities on Luma.
one_liner: The guest intelligence platform for high-value corporate events
